news.headline: Andrea Kimi Antonelli takes Miami Grand Prix as title battle tightens
news.body: Andrea Kimi Antonelli won at Miami International Autodrome. Current championship leader is Andrea Kimi Antonelli with 100 points, 20 clear of George Russell.

news.headline: Red Bull's new PU is down 15hp to Mercedes, paddock sources say
news.body: Despite the full Ford works programme, Red Bull's 2026 power unit appears weakest on the grid. Verstappen's P5 in Japan came from chassis, not pace.

news.headline: Cadillac goal is simple: finish races, learn fast, build for 2029
news.body: GM's eleventh team runs Ferrari PUs until its in-house unit is ready. Herta confirmed for four FP1 outings this year.

news.headline: FIA confirms Bahrain and Saudi cancellations, no replacements
news.body: Iran war fallout leaves the season at 23 rounds, Australia to Abu Dhabi. Feeder series affected too.

stats.label: Championship Lead
stats.sub: Andrea Kimi Antonelli over George Russell
